_comment: THE BOX for space-mission-control. Tools span themed MCP servers (telemetry, nav, power, kb, comms, cargo, thermal, attitude, water, crew). Hero tools have rich descriptions + additional_search_text and live in hero_tools/. telemetry.read_o2 is PINNED to show the pin feature. The rest are name+description only so the box is honestly large.

tools.name: telemetry.read_o2
tools.description: Read current cabin oxygen partial pressure and air-quality status; use when someone asks about breathable air, O2, life support, whether the cabin is stuffy, or if the crew is safe to breathe.
tools.additional_search_text: oxygen air quality life support breathable cabin atmosphere stuffy co2 ppO2 hypoxia

tools.name: nav.plot_burn
tools.description: Plan and compute a propulsive engine burn to change orbit, lower or raise altitude, phase for a rendezvous, or set up a deorbit; returns delta-v, burn duration, and ignition time.
tools.additional_search_text: orbit maneuver delta-v engine burn deorbit raise lower altitude rendezvous trajectory thruster

tools.name: power.balance_load
tools.description: Rebalance the electrical power budget across subsystems when draw is tight; sheds or reprioritizes non-critical loads to protect life support and avoid a brownout.
tools.additional_search_text: electrical power budget battery solar load shed brownout amps watts heaters draw distribute

tools.name: kb.search_procedures
tools.description: Search the flight procedures and emergency checklists library; use for any what-do-we-do-if-X-fails or pull-up-the-checklist-for-Y request.
tools.additional_search_text: procedure checklist emergency malfunction failure how do we handle steps protocol contingency scrubber

tools.name: comms.send_ground
tools.description: Send a status message, telemetry summary, or request down to ground control (Houston / mission control).
tools.additional_search_text: message houston ground control mission control downlink radio report tell the ground notify capcom

tools.name: cargo.manifest
tools.description: Look up the pressurized cargo manifest: what was loaded, stowage location, and mass for a given resupply flight.

tools.name: telemetry.read_pressure
tools.description: Read cabin total pressure.

tools.name: telemetry.read_temp
tools.description: Read cabin and module temperatures.

tools.name: thermal.set_loop
tools.description: Adjust the active thermal control coolant loop setpoint.

tools.name: thermal.read_radiators
tools.description: Read external radiator panel temperatures.

tools.name: attitude.read
tools.description: Read current spacecraft attitude and rates.

tools.name: attitude.set_pointing
tools.description: Command a new pointing/orientation.

tools.name: nav.read_state_vector
tools.description: Read current position and velocity state vector.

tools.name: nav.predict_pass
tools.description: Predict the next ground-station pass window.

tools.name: power.read_battery
tools.description: Read battery state of charge.

tools.name: power.read_solar
tools.description: Read solar array output.

tools.name: water.read_recycler
tools.description: Read water recycler status and tank levels.

tools.name: water.purge_line
tools.description: Purge a water line.

tools.name: crew.read_vitals
tools.description: Read crew biometric vitals.

tools.name: crew.schedule_task
tools.description: Schedule a crew task on the timeline.

tools.name: comms.read_signal
tools.description: Read uplink/downlink signal strength.

tools.name: cargo.stow_item
tools.description: Record stowage of an item to a location.

tools.name: kb.search_anomalies
tools.description: Search the past anomaly and lessons-learned database.

tools.name: experiments.run_payload
tools.description: Start a queued science payload experiment.
